query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skillReviewQueue` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `skillName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `skillType` enum('technique','pattern','reference') NOT NULL,
  `category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `keywords` text NOT NULL,
  `rules` text NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `outputLabels` text,
  `confidence` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT 0.80,
  `sourceType` enum('ai_learning','scheduled','manual') NOT NULL,
  `sourceTourId` int,
  `learningHistoryId` int,
  `status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','merged') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  `reviewedBy` int,
  `reviewedAt` timestamp,
  `reviewNotes` text,
  `createdSkillId` int,
  `priority` enum('low','medium','high') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
